This classification is based on various botanical characteristics and morphological features of the plant. The Urticaceae family includes a wide range of plants, many of which are vines or shrubs, and are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Within this family, Kirganelia eglandulosa is likely a member of the tribe Urticeae, which is a group of plants that share certain similarities in their leaf structure and growth habits. Further research may be needed to determine the exact classification and relationships of Kirganelia eglandulosa within the Urticaceae family.
